Table airlines with columns uid (integer), Airline (text), Abbreviation (text), Country (text)
Table airports with columns City (text), AirportCode (text), AirportName (text), Country (text), CountryAbbrev (text)
Table flights with columns Airline (integer), FlightNo (integer), SourceAirport (text), DestAirport (text) — foreign keys: DestAirport → airports(AirportCode), SourceAirport → airports(AirportCode)
